eoportal.name: M3MSat (Maritime Monitoring and Messaging Microsatellite)
eoportal.summary: M3MSat completed all mission objectives at the end of May 2021, and was handed over to a private company to commence commercial service missions.

faq.a: M3MSat was developed jointly by the Canadian Department of National Defence (DND), the Canadian Space Agency (CSA), exactEarth and COM DEV Ltd.
faq.q: Which departments are responsible for developing M3MSat?

faq.a: M3MSat aimed to augment existing Automatic Identification System (AIS) capabilities, and utilise AIS to provide maritime surveillance, in addition to demonstrating new technology as part of its secondary payload.
faq.q: What are the objectives of M3MSat?

faq.a: Onboard the satellite was an Automatic Identification System - Payload Electronics Module (AIS-PEM), Low Data Rate System - Payload Electronics Module (LDRS-PEM) and Dielectric Deep Charge Monitor (DDCM).
faq.q: What instruments are carried aboard M3MSat?

eoportal.name_zh: M3MSat（海事监测与通信微卫星）
eoportal.status_zh: 任务已结束，已移交商业运营
eoportal.summary_zh: M3MSat于2021年5月底完成了所有任务目标，并被移交给一家私营公司，以启动商业服务任务。
eoportal.summary_en: M3MSat completed all mission objectives at the end of May 2021, and was handed over to a private company to commence commercial service missions.

faq_zh.a: M3MSat由加拿大国防部、加拿大航天局、exactEarth公司和COM DEV有限公司联合开发。
faq_zh.q: 哪些部门负责开发M3MSat卫星？

faq_zh.a: M3MSat旨在增强现有的船舶自动识别系统（AIS）能力，并利用AIS提供海事监视，此外还通过其有效载荷演示新技术。
卫星搭载了船舶自动识别系统有效载荷电子模块（AIS-PEM）、低数据速率系统有效载荷电子模块（LDRS-PEM）和介电深度充电监测器（DDCM）。

faq_en.a: M3MSat was developed jointly by the Canadian Department of National Defence (DND), the Canadian Space Agency (CSA), exactEarth and COM DEV Ltd.
faq_en.q: Which departments are responsible for developing M3MSat?

faq_en.a: M3MSat aimed to augment existing Automatic Identification System (AIS) capabilities, and utilise AIS to provide maritime surveillance, in addition to demonstrating new technology as part of its secondary payload.
faq_en.q: What are the objectives of M3MSat?

faq_en.a: Onboard the satellite was an Automatic Identification System - Payload Electronics Module (AIS-PEM), Low Data Rate System - Payload Electronics Module (LDRS-PEM) and Dielectric Deep Charge Monitor (DDCM).
faq_en.q: What instruments are carried aboard M3MSat?

eoportal.name: Macau Scientific Satellite (MSS)
taxonomy: Macau University for Science and Technology (MUST)
eoportal.agency: Macau University for Science and Technology (MUST)
eoportal.summary: The mission consists of two operational satellites, MSS-1A and -1B, with two additional satellites, MSS-2, currently in development.

faq.a: The Macau Scientific Satellite Program aims to study the origin and evolution of the magnetic field, investigate the geomagnetic inversion mechanism and create a high-precision, high-resolution lithospheric geomagnetic map.
faq.q: What is the aim of the Macau Scientific Satellite Program?

faq.a: MSS-1 carries the Coupled Dark State Magnetometer (CDSM), the Flux Gate Magnetometer (FGM), the Energetic Electron Spectrometer (EES), the Vector Field Magnetometer (VFM), and the Solar X-ray detector (SXD).
faq.q: What instruments does the Macau Scientific Satellite Program consist of?

faq.a: Currently, there are two MSS-1 satellites in orbit, with MSS-2 in development.
faq.q: How many Macau Scientific Satellite missions are there?

eoportal.summary_zh: 该任务包括两颗在轨运行卫星MSS-1A和-1B，另有两颗MSS-2卫星正在研制中。
eoportal.summary_en: The mission consists of two operational satellites, MSS-1A and -1B, with two additional satellites, MSS-2, currently in development.

faq_zh.a: 澳门科学卫星计划旨在研究磁场的起源与演化，探究地磁倒转机制，并制作高精度、高分辨率的岩石圈地磁图。
faq_zh.q: 澳门科学卫星计划的目标是什么？

faq_zh.a: MSS-1搭载了耦合暗态磁强计（CDSM）、磁通门磁强计（FGM）、高能电子能谱仪（EES）、矢量场磁强计（VFM）和太阳X射线探测器（SXD）。
faq_zh.q: 澳门科学卫星计划搭载了哪些仪器？

faq_zh.a: 目前已有两颗MSS-1卫星在轨运行，MSS-2正在研制中。
faq_zh.q: 目前共有多少颗澳门科学卫星任务？

faq_en.a: The Macau Scientific Satellite Program aims to study the origin and evolution of the magnetic field, investigate the geomagnetic inversion mechanism and create a high-precision, high-resolution lithospheric geomagnetic map.
faq_en.q: What is the aim of the Macau Scientific Satellite Program?

faq_en.a: MSS-1 carries the Coupled Dark State Magnetometer (CDSM), the Flux Gate Magnetometer (FGM), the Energetic Electron Spectrometer (EES), the Vector Field Magnetometer (VFM), and the Solar X-ray detector (SXD).
faq_en.q: What instruments does the Macau Scientific Satellite Program consist of?

faq_en.a: Currently, there are two MSS-1 satellites in orbit, with MSS-2 in development.
faq_en.q: How many Macau Scientific Satellite missions are there?

eoportal.name: MAGIC (Mass-Change and Geosciences International Constellation)
taxonomy: Sea ice cover, edge and thickness
Soil moisture in the roots region

faq.a: MAGIC is a joint venture between the European Space Agency (ESA) and the National Aeronautics and Space Administration (NASA)
faq.q: Who is developing the MAGIC mission?

faq.a: MAGIC aims to measure variations in Earth’s gravitational field, measurements that are applicable in the investigation of mass transport processes.
faq.q: What is the aim of the MAGIC satellite mission?

faq.a: MAGIC satellites will operate in pairs, using high precision instruments to determine interdistance variations between two satellites flying 200 km apart from each other, from which gravitational field measurements can be derived.
faq.q: How does the MAGIC satellite mission work?

eoportal.summary_zh: 该任务将由四颗卫星组成，以两两配对的方式运行，用于测量地球重力场的波动。它建立在类似任务的成功经验之上，例如重力场与稳态海洋环流探测器（GOCE）任务、重力恢复与气候实验（GRACE）及其后续任务GRACE-FO。

faq_zh.a: MAGIC是欧洲空间局（ESA）和美国国家航空航天局（NASA）的合资项目。
MAGIC旨在测量地球重力场的变化，这些测量数据可用于研究物质传输过程。
faq_zh.q: MAGIC卫星任务的目标是什么？

faq_zh.a: MAGIC卫星将成对运行，利用高精度仪器测量相距200公里飞行的两颗卫星之间的距离变化，从而推导出重力场测量数据。

faq_en.a: MAGIC is a joint venture between the European Space Agency (ESA) and the National Aeronautics and Space Administration (NASA)
faq_en.q: Who is developing the MAGIC mission?

faq_en.a: MAGIC aims to measure variations in Earth’s gravitational field, measurements that are applicable in the investigation of mass transport processes.
faq_en.q: What is the aim of the MAGIC satellite mission?

faq_en.a: MAGIC satellites will operate in pairs, using high precision instruments to determine interdistance variations between two satellites flying 200 km apart from each other, from which gravitational field measurements can be derived.
faq_en.q: How does the MAGIC satellite mission work?

eoportal.name: MagSat / AEM-3 / Explorer 61
eoportal.summary: The chosen orbit, and mission lifetime (fall 1979 through spring 1980) allowed for a maximum exposure of the fixed solar array to the sun, a near-constant thermal environment, and a fixed flight attitude that allowed the star trackers to always face away from the Earth.
eoportal.summary_zh: 选定的轨道和任务寿命周期（1979年秋季至1980年春季）实现了固定太阳电池阵对阳光的最大化利用，创造了近乎恒定的热环境，并维持了固定的飞行姿态，使得星体跟踪器能够始终背对地球。
eoportal.summary_en: The chosen orbit, and mission lifetime (fall 1979 through spring 1980) allowed for a maximum exposure of the fixed solar array to the sun, a near-constant thermal environment, and a fixed flight attitude that allowed the star trackers to always face away from the Earth.

eoportal.name: MAIA (Multi-Angle Imager Aerosols)
taxonomy: Cloud type, amount and cloud top temperature
eoportal.agency: NASA, ASI, U.S. DoS, U.S. AID
eoportal.summary: The MAIA instrument will be hosted onboard the PLATiNO-2 satellite, with launch planned for 2025 on board a Vega-C rocket.

faq.a: PLATiNO-2 is developed by Leonardo and SITAEL for the ASI earth observation project. PLATiNO-2 will carry MAIA - the Multi-Angle Imager Aerosols.
faq.q: Who developed the PLATiNO-2 satellite?

faq.a: MAIA will be hosted onboard PLATiNO-2, which will orbit at 740 km, at an inclination of 98°. The period will be 98 minutes, and the local solar noon will occur at 10:30.
faq.q: What are MAIA’s orbit details?

faq.a: MAIA is NASA’s first mission whose primary goal is to benefit societal health, observation measurements will be combined with health information to determine the toxicity of different aerosols.
faq.q: What is so important about MAIA?

eoportal.agency_zh: NASA, ASI, U.S. DoS, U.S. AID
eoportal.summary_zh: MAIA仪器将搭载在PLATiNO-2卫星上，计划于2025年由Vega-C火箭发射升空。
eoportal.summary_en: The MAIA instrument will be hosted onboard the PLATiNO-2 satellite, with launch planned for 2025 on board a Vega-C rocket.

faq_zh.a: PLATiNO-2由Leonardo和SITAEL为ASI的地球观测项目开发。它将搭载MAIA——多角度成像仪气溶胶。
MAIA将搭载在PLATiNO-2卫星上，运行在740公里高度、倾角98°的轨道上。轨道周期为98分钟，地方时正午发生在10:30。
MAIA是NASA首个以造福社会健康为主要目标的任务，其观测数据将与健康信息相结合，以确定不同气溶胶的毒性。

faq_en.a: PLATiNO-2 is developed by Leonardo and SITAEL for the ASI earth observation project. PLATiNO-2 will carry MAIA - the Multi-Angle Imager Aerosols.
faq_en.q: Who developed the PLATiNO-2 satellite?

faq_en.a: MAIA will be hosted onboard PLATiNO-2, which will orbit at 740 km, at an inclination of 98°. The period will be 98 minutes, and the local solar noon will occur at 10:30.
faq_en.q: What are MAIA’s orbit details?

faq_en.a: MAIA is NASA’s first mission whose primary goal is to benefit societal health, observation measurements will be combined with health information to determine the toxicity of different aerosols.
faq_en.q: What is so important about MAIA?

eoportal.name: MATS (Mesospheric Airglow/Aerosol Tomography and Spectroscopy)
eoportal.summary: The mission, launched in November 2022, has a planned design life of 2 years.

faq.a: OHB Sweden, AAC Microtec and MISU have developed and operate MATS.
faq.q: Which organisation operates MATS (Mesospheric Airglow/Aerosol Tomography and Spectroscopy)?

faq.a: MATS focuses on MLT (Mesosphere and Lower Thermosphere) region.
faq.q: What region does MATS focus on?

faq.a: MATS’ imaging in combination with tomographic and spectroscopic analysis to obtain gravity wave data on relevant spatial scales. This data can be used to produce a climatology on wave spectra over its two-year mission.
faq.q: What does MATS measure? How will MATS use this data?

eoportal.name_zh: MATS（中层气辉/气溶胶层析与光谱探测卫星）
eoportal.summary_zh: 该卫星任务于2022年11月发射，设计寿命为2年。
eoportal.summary_en: The mission, launched in November 2022, has a planned design life of 2 years.

faq_zh.a: MATS卫星由OHB Sweden、AAC Microtec和MISU共同开发并运营。
faq_zh.q: 哪个机构运营MATS（中层气辉/气溶胶层析与光谱探测卫星）？

faq_zh.a: MATS专注于中间层与低热层（MLT）区域的研究。
MATS通过成像，并结合层析和光谱分析，在相关空间尺度上获取重力波数据。这些数据可用于在其两年任务期内生成波谱的气候学记录。
faq_zh.q: MATS测量什么？它将如何使用这些数据？

faq_en.a: OHB Sweden, AAC Microtec and MISU have developed and operate MATS.
faq_en.q: Which organisation operates MATS (Mesospheric Airglow/Aerosol Tomography and Spectroscopy)?

faq_en.a: MATS focuses on MLT (Mesosphere and Lower Thermosphere) region.
faq_en.q: What region does MATS focus on?

faq_en.a: MATS’ imaging in combination with tomographic and spectroscopic analysis to obtain gravity wave data on relevant spatial scales. This data can be used to produce a climatology on wave spectra over its two-year mission.
faq_en.q: What does MATS measure? How will MATS use this data?

eoportal.name: MERLIN (Methane Remote Sensing Lidar Mission)
eoportal.summary: The minisatellite aims to reveal the implications of methane gas on global warming and climate change.

faq.a: MERLIN’s objective is to obtain highly accurate spatial and temporal gradients of atmospheric methane to enable scientists to draw conclusions about the various sources of methane emissions and the implications of methane gas for global warming and climate change.
faq.q: What will MERLIN be used for?

faq.a: MERLIN is currently being developed collaboratively by the German Aerospace Centre (DLR) and the French Space Agency (CNES).
faq.q: Who is developing MERLIN?

eoportal.name_zh: MERLIN (甲烷遥感激光雷达任务)
eoportal.summary_zh: 这颗微型卫星旨在揭示甲烷气体对全球变暖和气候变化的影响。
eoportal.summary_en: The minisatellite aims to reveal the implications of methane gas on global warming and climate change.

faq_zh.a: MERLIN的目标是获取大气甲烷高精度的时空梯度数据，以帮助科学家推断甲烷排放的各种来源，以及甲烷气体对全球变暖和气候变化的影响。
MERLIN目前正在由德国宇航中心（DLR）和法国国家空间研究中心（CNES）合作开发。

faq_en.a: MERLIN’s objective is to obtain highly accurate spatial and temporal gradients of atmospheric methane to enable scientists to draw conclusions about the various sources of methane emissions and the implications of methane gas for global warming and climate change.
faq_en.q: What will MERLIN be used for?

faq_en.a: MERLIN is currently being developed collaboratively by the German Aerospace Centre (DLR) and the French Space Agency (CNES).
faq_en.q: Who is developing MERLIN?

eoportal.summary: A COSPAS-SARSAT search-and-rescue transponder (the RK-SM unit) is also carried, which listens for distress signals and re-transmits them to the ground.

faq.a: The Meteor-M No.2 series provides global weather observation, atmospheric sounding, and environmental monitoring from polar orbit, supporting operational meteorology and climate studies.
faq.q: What is the primary purpose of the Meteor-M No.2 satellite series?

faq.a: Six satellites (Meteor-M No.2 through No.2-6) are planned in the series to ensure continuity of coverage and frequent revisit times.
faq.q: How many Meteor-M No.2 satellites are planned?

faq.a: Yes, Meteor-M satellites transmit real-time data via HRPT and LRPT downlinks, allowing ground stations and amateur users to receive weather images directly.
faq.q: Can Meteor-M data be received directly by users?

eoportal.agency_zh: ROSKOSMOS (俄罗斯国家航天集团), ROSHYDROMET (俄罗斯联邦水文气象局)
eoportal.summary_zh: 该卫星还搭载了一个COSPAS-SARSAT搜索与救援应答器（RK-SM单元），用于监听遇险信号并将其转发至地面。
eoportal.summary_en: A COSPAS-SARSAT search-and-rescue transponder (the RK-SM unit) is also carried, which listens for distress signals and re-transmits them to the ground.

faq_zh.a: 流星-M2系列卫星从极地轨道提供全球气象观测、大气探测和环境监测，支持业务气象服务和气候研究。
faq_zh.q: 流星-M2卫星系列的主要用途是什么？

faq_zh.a: 该系列计划部署六颗卫星（流星-M2至M2-6），以确保覆盖的连续性和较高的重访频率。
faq_zh.q: 计划部署多少颗流星-M2卫星？

faq_zh.a: 是的，流星卫星通过HRPT和LRPT下行链路实时传输数据，允许地面站和业余用户直接接收气象图像。
faq_zh.q: 用户能否直接接收流星卫星的数据？

faq_en.a: The Meteor-M No.2 series provides global weather observation, atmospheric sounding, and environmental monitoring from polar orbit, supporting operational meteorology and climate studies.
faq_en.q: What is the primary purpose of the Meteor-M No.2 satellite series?

faq_en.a: Six satellites (Meteor-M No.2 through No.2-6) are planned in the series to ensure continuity of coverage and frequent revisit times.
faq_en.q: How many Meteor-M No.2 satellites are planned?

faq_en.a: Yes, Meteor-M satellites transmit real-time data via HRPT and LRPT downlinks, allowing ground stations and amateur users to receive weather images directly.
faq_en.q: Can Meteor-M data be received directly by users?

Meteosat Second Generation (MSG) is a series of climate and forecasting missions developed by ESA and EUMETSAT.

faq.a: Meteosat Second Generation (MSG) is a series of climate and forecasting missions that were developed by the European Space Agency (ESA) and the European Organisation for the Exploitation of Meteorological Satellites (EUMETSAT).
faq.q: What is Meteosat Second Generation and who developed the mission?

faq.a: Meteosat Second Generation (MSG) provides data with numerous applications to fields such as meteorology, climatology, atmospheric science and energy. The satellite provides meteorologists with valid predictive models and delivers effective climate modelling.
faq.q: What is the purpose of Meteosat Second Generation?

faq.a: MSG satellites consist of the Spinning Enhanced Visible and Infra-red Imager (SEVIRI), the Geostationary Earth Radiation Budget (GERB), the Geostationary Search and Rescue (GEOS&R) and the Data Collection System (DCS).
faq.q: Which instruments are on Meteosat Second Generation satellites MSG-1 and MSG-2?

Meteosat Second Generation (MSG) is a series of climate and forecasting missions developed by ESA and EUMETSAT.

faq_zh.a: 气象卫星第二代（MSG）是由欧洲空间局（ESA）和欧洲气象卫星开发组织（EUMETSAT）共同开发的一系列气候和天气预报任务卫星。
faq_zh.q: 什么是气象卫星第二代（Meteosat Second Generation）？该任务由谁开发？

faq_zh.a: 气象卫星第二代（MSG）提供的数据广泛应用于气象学、气候学、大气科学和能源等多个领域。该卫星为气象学家提供有效的预测模型，并支持高效的气候建模。
faq_zh.q: 气象卫星第二代的目的是什么？

faq_zh.a: MSG 卫星搭载的仪器包括：自旋增强可见光及红外成像仪（SEVIRI）、地球静止轨道辐射收支探测仪（GERB）、地球静止轨道搜索与救援系统（GEOS&R）以及数据收集系统（DCS）。
faq_zh.q: 气象卫星第二代卫星 MSG-1 和 MSG-2 上搭载了哪些仪器？

faq_en.a: Meteosat Second Generation (MSG) is a series of climate and forecasting missions that were developed by the European Space Agency (ESA) and the European Organisation for the Exploitation of Meteorological Satellites (EUMETSAT).
faq_en.q: What is Meteosat Second Generation and who developed the mission?

faq_en.a: Meteosat Second Generation (MSG) provides data with numerous applications to fields such as meteorology, climatology, atmospheric science and energy. The satellite provides meteorologists with valid predictive models and delivers effective climate modelling.
faq_en.q: What is the purpose of Meteosat Second Generation?

faq_en.a: MSG satellites consist of the Spinning Enhanced Visible and Infra-red Imager (SEVIRI), the Geostationary Earth Radiation Budget (GERB), the Geostationary Search and Rescue (GEOS&R) and the Data Collection System (DCS).
faq_en.q: Which instruments are on Meteosat Second Generation satellites MSG-1 and MSG-2?

eoportal.summary: MetOp-A, launched in 2006 and retired in 2021, began the MetOp series, followed by the launches of MetOp-B and -C in 2012 and 2018, respectively.

faq.a: The MetOp mission consists of three satellites, MetOp-A, MetOp-B, and MetOp-C. MetOp-A was retired at the end of 2021 after 15 years of operation, while MetOp-B and MetOp-C continue to be operational.
faq.q: Are the MetOp satellites still operational?

faq.a: MetOp satellites provide detailed global observations of the atmosphere, oceans and land to provide observations and data for weather prediction and climate monitoring.
faq.q: What do the MetOp satellites do?

faq.a: MetOp stands for Meteorological Operational satellite and is a series of three satellites developed by the European Space Agency (ESA) and operated by the European Organisation for the Exploitation of Meteorological Satellites (EUMETSAT).

eoportal.summary_en: MetOp-A, launched in 2006 and retired in 2021, began the MetOp series, followed by the launches of MetOp-B and -C in 2012 and 2018, respectively.

MetOp卫星提供对大气、海洋和陆地的详细全球观测，为天气预报和气候监测提供观测数据。
MetOp代表气象业务卫星（Meteorological Operational satellite），是由欧洲空间局（ESA）开发、欧洲气象卫星组织（EUMETSAT）运营的一系列三颗卫星。

faq_en.q: Are the MetOp satellites still operational?

eoportal.name: MEV-1 & 2 (Mission Extension Vehicle-1 and -2)
eoportal.summary: MEV-1 provides life-extending services by taking over the propulsion and attitude control functions to steer, point and relocate the client spacecraft, while MEV-2 acts as fuel for a functioning satellite without means of significant propulsion.

faq.a: As of July 2022, MEV-1 is currently servicing Intelsat 901 and MEV-2 is servicing Intelsat 10-02. They are intended to perform the satellite life extension service for a period of five years, beginning in August 2020 and April 2021 respectively.
faq.q: What satellites are MEV-1 and MEV-2 currently servicing?

faq.a: MEV-1 and MEV-2 have a similar design but have contrasting service characteristics. MEV-1 controls the orbit of the customer satellite whereas MEV-2 acts as a new engine and fuel tank to extend the client spacecraft’s life.
faq.q: What is the difference between MEV-1 and MEV-2?

faq.a: MEV-1 was launched in October 2019 by ILS (International Launch Services) and MEV-2 was launched in August 2020 by Ariane Space.
faq.q: When were MEV-1 and MEV-2 launched?

eoportal.summary_zh: MEV-1通过接管客户航天器的推进和姿态控制功能，为其提供延长寿命的服务，包括转向、定向和重新定位；MEV-2则作为功能正常但缺乏足够推进能力的卫星的推进剂补充，以延长其使用寿命。
eoportal.summary_en: MEV-1 provides life-extending services by taking over the propulsion and attitude control functions to steer, point and relocate the client spacecraft, while MEV-2 acts as fuel for a functioning satellite without means of significant propulsion.

faq_zh.a: 截至2022年7月，MEV-1正在为Intelsat 901提供服务，MEV-2正在为Intelsat 10-02提供服务。它们分别计划从2020年8月和2021年4月开始，为卫星提供为期五年的寿命延长服务。
faq_zh.q: MEV-1和MEV-2目前分别为哪些卫星提供服务？

faq_zh.a: MEV-1和MEV-2设计相似，但服务特性截然不同。MEV-1控制客户卫星的轨道，而MEV-2则作为新的发动机和燃料箱，以延长客户航天器的寿命。
MEV-1由国际发射服务公司（ILS）于2019年10月发射，MEV-2由阿里安航天公司于2020年8月发射。

faq_en.a: As of July 2022, MEV-1 is currently servicing Intelsat 901 and MEV-2 is servicing Intelsat 10-02. They are intended to perform the satellite life extension service for a period of five years, beginning in August 2020 and April 2021 respectively.
faq_en.q: What satellites are MEV-1 and MEV-2 currently servicing?

faq_en.a: MEV-1 and MEV-2 have a similar design but have contrasting service characteristics. MEV-1 controls the orbit of the customer satellite whereas MEV-2 acts as a new engine and fuel tank to extend the client spacecraft’s life.
faq_en.q: What is the difference between MEV-1 and MEV-2?

faq_en.a: MEV-1 was launched in October 2019 by ILS (International Launch Services) and MEV-2 was launched in August 2020 by Ariane Space.
faq_en.q: When were MEV-1 and MEV-2 launched?

eoportal.name: MicroCarb (Carbon Dioxide Monitoring Mission)
eoportal.summary: Considered a successor to other carbon dioxide missions such as Greenhouse gas Observing Satellite (GOSAT) and Orbiting Carbon Observatory-2 (OCO-2), the objective of MicroCarb is to monitor the fluxes of carbon dioxide between the atmosphere, oceans and vegetation.

faq.a: MicroCarb will aim to monitor the fluxes of carbon dioxide at the surface between the atmosphere and the oceans and vegetation with high precision. This data will be used for a number of purposes including increasing our understanding of the functioning of vegetation, identifying and quantifying the terrestrial ecosystem carbon sinks and sources at yearly scales, quantifying oceanic carbon sources and sinks at a yearly scale and their responses to announced climate changes, and contributing to the measurement of carbon emission linked to fossil fuels use.
faq.q: What will MicroCarb be used for?

faq.a: MicroCarb is being developed by the French Space Agency, Centre National d’Etudes Spatiales (CNES), with support from the United Kingdom Space Agency (UKSA).
faq.q: Who is developing MicroCarb?

eoportal.agency_zh: CNES（法国国家空间研究中心）、UKSA（英国航天局）
eoportal.summary_zh: MicroCarb 被视为温室气体观测卫星（GOSAT）和轨道碳观测卫星-2（OCO-2）等其他二氧化碳任务的后续，其目标是监测大气、海洋和植被之间的二氧化碳通量。
eoportal.summary_en: Considered a successor to other carbon dioxide missions such as Greenhouse gas Observing Satellite (GOSAT) and Orbiting Carbon Observatory-2 (OCO-2), the objective of MicroCarb is to monitor the fluxes of carbon dioxide between the atmosphere, oceans and vegetation.

faq_zh.a: MicroCarb 将致力于高精度监测地表大气与海洋、植被间的二氧化碳通量。这些数据将用于多种目的，包括增进对植被功能的理解、识别和量化年尺度的陆地生态系统碳汇与碳源、量化年尺度的海洋碳汇与碳源及其对已宣布气候变化的响应，以及协助测量与化石燃料使用相关的碳排放。
MicroCarb 由法国国家空间研究中心（CNES）开发，并得到英国航天局（UKSA）的支持。

faq_en.a: MicroCarb will aim to monitor the fluxes of carbon dioxide at the surface between the atmosphere and the oceans and vegetation with high precision. This data will be used for a number of purposes including increasing our understanding of the functioning of vegetation, identifying and quantifying the terrestrial ecosystem carbon sinks and sources at yearly scales, quantifying oceanic carbon sources and sinks at a yearly scale and their responses to announced climate changes, and contributing to the measurement of carbon emission linked to fossil fuels use.
faq_en.q: What will MicroCarb be used for?

faq_en.a: MicroCarb is being developed by the French Space Agency, Centre National d’Etudes Spatiales (CNES), with support from the United Kingdom Space Agency (UKSA).
faq_en.q: Who is developing MicroCarb?

eoportal.name: MicroSCOPE (Micro-Satellite à traînée Compensée pour l'Observation du Principe d'Equivalence)
eoportal.summary: Between its launch in April 2016 and its end of life in October 2018, the mission successfully tested the WEP to an accuracy of the order of 10-14.

faq.a: While the best accuracy of the Equivalence Principle achieved by experiments on Earth is 10-13, the MicroSCOPE mission aimed to improve this value by two orders of magnitude, up to 10-15.
faq.q: What was the target accuracy of the MicroSCOPE mission?

faq.a: The satellite employed a micro propulsion system to precisely cancel these factors.
faq.q: How did MicroSCOPE counteract external perturbations, such as atmospheric drag, radiation pressure or electromagnetic forces?

faq.a: In the inertial mode, fep was about 1.7 x 10-4 Hz, while in the rotating mode, it reached 1.0 x 10-3 Hz
faq.q: What value did the Equivalence Principle frequency have throughout the experiment?

eoportal.name_zh: MicroSCOPE（Micro-Satellite à traînée Compensée pour l'Observation du Principe d'Equivalence）
eoportal.summary_zh: 该任务于2016年4月发射，2018年10月结束寿命，成功将等效原理的测试精度提升至10⁻¹⁴量级。
eoportal.summary_en: Between its launch in April 2016 and its end of life in October 2018, the mission successfully tested the WEP to an accuracy of the order of 10-14.

faq_zh.a: 地面实验实现的等效原理最佳精度为10⁻¹³，MicroSCOPE任务旨在将此数值提高两个数量级，达到10⁻¹⁵。
faq_zh.q: MicroSCOPE任务的目标精度是多少？

faq_zh.a: 卫星采用微推进系统来精确补偿这些因素。
faq_zh.q: MicroSCOPE如何抵消大气阻力、辐射压力或电磁力等外部扰动？

faq_zh.a: 在惯性模式下，fep约为1.7×10⁻⁴ Hz；在旋转模式下，达到1.0×10⁻³ Hz。
faq_zh.q: 在整个实验过程中，等效原理频率值是多少？

faq_en.a: While the best accuracy of the Equivalence Principle achieved by experiments on Earth is 10-13, the MicroSCOPE mission aimed to improve this value by two orders of magnitude, up to 10-15.
faq_en.q: What was the target accuracy of the MicroSCOPE mission?

faq_en.a: The satellite employed a micro propulsion system to precisely cancel these factors.
faq_en.q: How did MicroSCOPE counteract external perturbations, such as atmospheric drag, radiation pressure or electromagnetic forces?

faq_en.a: In the inertial mode, fep was about 1.7 x 10-4 Hz, while in the rotating mode, it reached 1.0 x 10-3 Hz
faq_en.q: What value did the Equivalence Principle frequency have throughout the experiment?

eoportal.name: MTG (Meteosat Third Generation)
taxonomy: Cloud type, amount and cloud top temperature
Downward long-wave irradiance at Earth surface
Precipitation intensity at the surface (liquid or solid)
Sea ice cover, edge and thickness
eoportal.summary: There will be a total of six satellites launched, consisting of four MTG-I (Imager) satellites and two MTG-S (Sounder) satellites, with the first MTG-I satellite launched on 13 December 2022.

faq.a: The Meteosat Third Generation (MTG) program consists of six satellites, two sounders and four imagers. The first satellite, MTG-I1, was launched on December 13 2022 on board the Ariane-5 rocket.
faq.q: When will Meteosat Third Generation launch?

faq.a: Sentinel-4 is a part of the Copernicus European Earth observation program and has the primary objective of observing the diurnal cycle of the tropospheric composition over Europe and North Africa. Sentinel-4 will be hosted on board the MTG-S satellites. MTG will continue data from previous satellites for weather forecasting and predictions of severe weather events.
faq.q: What is the difference between Sentinel-4 mission and MTG mission?

faq.a: The Meteosat Third Generation (MTG) mission consists of two different types of satellites, a sounder (MTG-S) and an Imager (MTG-I).  MTG-I will carry the Flexible Combined Imager (FCI) and Lightning Imager (LI), while MTG-S will carry the Infrared Sounder (IRS) as well as the instrument for the Copernicus Sentinel-4 mission, the UV-visible- near infrared imaging spectrometer (UVN).
faq.q: What is the difference between MTG-S and MTG-I?

eoportal.summary_zh: 该计划将总共发射六颗卫星，包括四颗MTG-I（成像仪）卫星和两颗MTG-S（探测仪）卫星，其中首颗MTG-I卫星于2022年12月13日发射。
eoportal.summary_en: There will be a total of six satellites launched, consisting of four MTG-I (Imager) satellites and two MTG-S (Sounder) satellites, with the first MTG-I satellite launched on 13 December 2022.

faq_zh.a: 第三代气象卫星计划包含六颗卫星，两颗探测仪和四颗成像仪。首颗卫星MTG-I1于2022年12月13日搭载阿丽亚娜-5火箭发射。
faq_zh.q: 第三代气象卫星何时发射？

faq_zh.a: 哨兵-4（Sentinel-4）是哥白尼欧洲对地观测计划的一部分，主要目标是观测欧洲和北非上空对流层成分的昼夜变化周期。哨兵-4将搭载于MTG-S卫星上。MTG将继续先前卫星的数据，用于天气预报和极端天气事件预测。
faq_zh.q: 哨兵-4任务与MTG任务有何区别？

faq_zh.a: 第三代气象卫星任务包含两种不同类型的卫星：探测仪（MTG-S）和成像仪（MTG-I）。MTG-I将搭载灵活组合成像仪（FCI）和闪电成像仪（LI），而MTG-S将搭载红外探测仪（IRS）以及为哥白尼哨兵-4任务服务的仪器——紫外-可见-近红外成像光谱仪（UVN）。

faq_en.a: The Meteosat Third Generation (MTG) program consists of six satellites, two sounders and four imagers. The first satellite, MTG-I1, was launched on December 13 2022 on board the Ariane-5 rocket.
faq_en.q: When will Meteosat Third Generation launch?

faq_en.a: Sentinel-4 is a part of the Copernicus European Earth observation program and has the primary objective of observing the diurnal cycle of the tropospheric composition over Europe and North Africa. Sentinel-4 will be hosted on board the MTG-S satellites. MTG will continue data from previous satellites for weather forecasting and predictions of severe weather events.
faq_en.q: What is the difference between Sentinel-4 mission and MTG mission?

faq_en.a: The Meteosat Third Generation (MTG) mission consists of two different types of satellites, a sounder (MTG-S) and an Imager (MTG-I).  MTG-I will carry the Flexible Combined Imager (FCI) and Lightning Imager (LI), while MTG-S will carry the Infrared Sounder (IRS) as well as the instrument for the Copernicus Sentinel-4 mission, the UV-visible- near infrared imaging spectrometer (UVN).
faq_en.q: What is the difference between MTG-S and MTG-I?

eoportal.name: MTSAT (Multifunction Transport Satellite)
taxonomy: Cloud type, amount and cloud top temperature

eoportal.name: MULA (Multispectral Unit for Land Assessment)
eoportal.summary: The mission aims to produce medium resolution multispectral optical imagery for primarily agricultural applications, as well as advance the Filipino national space program.

faq.a: MULA is currently being developed by the Advanced Satellite Development and Know-How Transfer for the Philippines (ASP) Project of the Space Technology Applications, Mastery, Innovation, and Advancement (STAMINA4Space) Program and the Philippine Space Agency (PhilSA), in conjunction with industry support from Surrey Satellite Technology Ltd.
faq.q: Who owns MULA?

faq.a: MULA aims to capture medium resolution optical imagery, with applications predominantly in agriculture, forestry and mapping, as well as advancing the Philippines national space program.
faq.q: What is the aim of MULA?

faq.a: MULA will carry the Surrey Satellite Technology Ltd. (SSTL) TrueColour Imager, providing multispectral optical imagery with a wide swath and medium spatial resolution.
faq.q: What instrument does MULA carry?

eoportal.summary_zh: 该任务旨在生成中等分辨率的多光谱光学影像，主要应用于农业领域，同时推动菲律宾国家航天计划的发展。
eoportal.summary_en: The mission aims to produce medium resolution multispectral optical imagery for primarily agricultural applications, as well as advance the Filipino national space program.

faq_zh.a: MULA卫星目前由菲律宾航天技术应用、掌握、创新与进步计划下的高级卫星开发与知识转移项目与菲律宾航天局共同开发，并得到萨里卫星技术有限公司的行业支持。
MULA旨在获取中等分辨率的光学影像，主要应用于农业、林业和测绘领域，同时推动菲律宾国家航天计划的发展。
MULA将搭载萨里卫星技术有限公司的TrueColour成像仪，提供宽幅、中等空间分辨率的多光谱光学影像。

faq_en.a: MULA is currently being developed by the Advanced Satellite Development and Know-How Transfer for the Philippines (ASP) Project of the Space Technology Applications, Mastery, Innovation, and Advancement (STAMINA4Space) Program and the Philippine Space Agency (PhilSA), in conjunction with industry support from Surrey Satellite Technology Ltd.
faq_en.q: Who owns MULA?

faq_en.a: MULA aims to capture medium resolution optical imagery, with applications predominantly in agriculture, forestry and mapping, as well as advancing the Philippines national space program.
faq_en.q: What is the aim of MULA?

faq_en.a: MULA will carry the Surrey Satellite Technology Ltd. (SSTL) TrueColour Imager, providing multispectral optical imagery with a wide swath and medium spatial resolution.
faq_en.q: What instrument does MULA carry?

eoportal.name: Munin Nanosatellite
taxonomy: Cloud type, amount and cloud top temperature
eoportal.summary: Munin only, the other two S/C were separated and put into a sun-synchronous orbit at 707 km altitude).
eoportal.summary_zh: Munin 是一颗纳米卫星，另外两颗航天器被分离并送入高度707公里的太阳同步轨道。
eoportal.summary_en: Munin only, the other two S/C were separated and put into a sun-synchronous orbit at 707 km altitude).

eoportal.name: MuSat (Muon Space)
eoportal.summary: MuSat-1 launched on June 12, 2023.

faq.a: The MuSat satellites are designed, built, and operated by Muon Space, a American commercial aerospace company specialising in Earth observation constellations through a vertically integrated platform.
faq.q: Who operates the MuSat satellites?

faq.a: MuSat satellites support climate monitoring, national security, and resource management by providing high-resolution Earth observation data. Their modular design allows them to host diverse payloads, including thermal infrared sensors and GNSS reflectometry instruments for environmental and defense applications.
faq.q: What are the main applications of the MuSat satellites?

faq.a: MuSat-1, the first satellite developed by Muon Space, was launched on June 12, 2023, aboard the SpaceX Transporter-8 rideshare mission. It successfully fulfilled its mission objectives before re-entering Earth’s atmosphere on December 11, 2024.
faq.q: When did the first MuSat satellite launch?

eoportal.summary_zh: MuSat-1卫星于2023年6月12日发射。
eoportal.summary_en: MuSat-1 launched on June 12, 2023.

faq_zh.a: MuSat卫星由美国商业航天公司Muon Space设计、建造和运营。该公司专注于通过垂直整合平台构建地球观测星座。
MuSat卫星通过提供高分辨率地球观测数据，支持气候监测、国家安全和资源管理。其模块化设计使其能够搭载多种有效载荷，包括用于环境与国防应用的热红外传感器和GNSS反射测量仪器。
faq_zh.q: MuSat卫星的主要应用是什么？

faq_zh.a: Muon Space开发的首颗卫星MuSat-1于2023年6月12日搭载SpaceX Transporter-8拼车任务发射升空。它在2024年12月11日重返地球大气层前，已成功完成既定任务目标。

faq_en.a: The MuSat satellites are designed, built, and operated by Muon Space, a American commercial aerospace company specialising in Earth observation constellations through a vertically integrated platform.
faq_en.q: Who operates the MuSat satellites?

faq_en.a: MuSat satellites support climate monitoring, national security, and resource management by providing high-resolution Earth observation data. Their modular design allows them to host diverse payloads, including thermal infrared sensors and GNSS reflectometry instruments for environmental and defense applications.
faq_en.q: What are the main applications of the MuSat satellites?

faq_en.a: MuSat-1, the first satellite developed by Muon Space, was launched on June 12, 2023, aboard the SpaceX Transporter-8 rideshare mission. It successfully fulfilled its mission objectives before re-entering Earth’s atmosphere on December 11, 2024.
faq_en.q: When did the first MuSat satellite launch?

eoportal.name: NACHOS (Nano-satellite Atmospheric Chemistry Hyperspectral Observation System)
eoportal.summary: NACHOS used newly developed, computationally efficient algorithms that could  rapidly extract gas signatures from massive hyperspectral datasets, taking just minutes to do so on the onboard computer.

faq.a: NACHOS-1 decayed on February 3, 2023 after almost one year in orbit. NACHOS-2 re-entered Earth’s atmosphere on June 27, 2024.
faq.q: Is NACHOS-1 still operational?

faq.a: Due to its size and efficiency, NACHOS was a more cost-effective way of measuring harmful trace gases.
faq.q: Why was NACHOS so important for climate change?

faq.a: NACHOS-1 was to verify instrument design and gather enough test data to ensure the technology concept is feasible.
faq.q: Why was NACHOS-1 in orbit for only a year?

eoportal.name_zh: NACHOS（纳米卫星大气化学高光谱观测系统）
eoportal.summary_zh: NACHOS采用了新开发的、计算效率高的算法，能够从海量高光谱数据集中快速提取气体特征信号，在星载计算机上仅需几分钟即可完成。
eoportal.summary_en: NACHOS used newly developed, computationally efficient algorithms that could  rapidly extract gas signatures from massive hyperspectral datasets, taking just minutes to do so on the onboard computer.

faq_zh.a: NACHOS-1在轨运行近一年后于2023年2月3日坠入大气层。NACHOS-2则于2024年6月27日再入地球大气层。
由于其体积小、效率高，NACHOS是测量有害痕量气体的一种更经济高效的方式。
faq_zh.q: 为什么NACHOS对气候变化研究如此重要？

faq_zh.a: NACHOS-1的任务是验证仪器设计并收集足够的测试数据，以确保该技术概念是可行的。
faq_zh.q: 为什么NACHOS-1只在轨运行了一年？

faq_en.a: NACHOS-1 decayed on February 3, 2023 after almost one year in orbit. NACHOS-2 re-entered Earth’s atmosphere on June 27, 2024.
faq_en.q: Is NACHOS-1 still operational?

faq_en.a: Due to its size and efficiency, NACHOS was a more cost-effective way of measuring harmful trace gases.
faq_en.q: Why was NACHOS so important for climate change?

faq_en.a: NACHOS-1 was to verify instrument design and gather enough test data to ensure the technology concept is feasible.
faq_en.q: Why was NACHOS-1 in orbit for only a year?

nachos (nano-satellite atmospheric chemi.display: NACHOS (Nano-satellite Atmospheric Chemistry Hyperspectral Observation System)

eoportal.name: Nancy Grace Roman Telescope
eoportal.summary: The mission aims to expand our understanding of the universe through unprecedented wide-field surveys and high-contrast imaging.

faq.a: Roman's mission is to explore dark energy, exoplanets, and infrared astrophysics through wide-area sky surveys and direct imaging.
faq.q: What is the Roman Space Telescope's primary mission?

faq.a: Roman has the same mirror size as Hubble but a field of view 200 times larger, allowing for more extensive sky surveys in less time.
faq.q: How does Roman compare to Hubble?

faq.a: Roman carries two primary instruments, the Wide Field Instrument (WFI) and the Coronagraph Instrument.
faq.q: What instruments are onboard Nancy Grace Roman Telescope?

eoportal.name_zh: 南希·格雷斯·罗曼空间望远镜
eoportal.summary_zh: 该任务旨在通过前所未有的宽视场巡天和高对比度成像，拓展我们对宇宙的理解。
eoportal.summary_en: The mission aims to expand our understanding of the universe through unprecedented wide-field surveys and high-contrast imaging.

faq_zh.a: 罗曼空间望远镜的任务是通过大范围天空巡天和直接成像，探索暗能量、系外行星和红外天体物理学。
faq_zh.q: 罗曼空间望远镜的主要任务是什么？

faq_zh.a: 罗曼望远镜拥有与哈勃望远镜相同的镜面尺寸，但视场范围大了200倍，能在更短的时间内进行更广泛的天空巡天。
faq_zh.q: 罗曼望远镜与哈勃望远镜相比有何不同？

faq_zh.a: 罗曼望远镜搭载了两个主要仪器：宽视场仪器和日冕仪。
faq_zh.q: 南希·格雷斯·罗曼空间望远镜搭载了哪些仪器？

faq_en.a: Roman's mission is to explore dark energy, exoplanets, and infrared astrophysics through wide-area sky surveys and direct imaging.
faq_en.q: What is the Roman Space Telescope's primary mission?

faq_en.a: Roman has the same mirror size as Hubble but a field of view 200 times larger, allowing for more extensive sky surveys in less time.
faq_en.q: How does Roman compare to Hubble?

faq_en.a: Roman carries two primary instruments, the Wide Field Instrument (WFI) and the Coronagraph Instrument.
faq_en.q: What instruments are onboard Nancy Grace Roman Telescope?

eoportal.name: NanoMagSat
eoportal.summary: NanoMagSat will monitor Earth’s magnetic field and ionosphere over its expected lifetime of three years.

faq.a: NanoMagSat is occasionally referred to as Swarm Delta as it follows Swarm Alpha, Bravo, and Charlie.
faq.q: Does NanoMagSat go by any other names?

faq.a: The British company, Open Cosmos, is operating the mission which is largely funded by ESA. The scientific lead is the Université Paris Cité’s Institut de Physique du Globe de Paris (Paris University’s Institute of Physics), and there is a collection of smaller institutions developing the payloads.
faq.q: Who is developing NanoMagSat?

faq.a: NanoMagSat will monitor Earth’s magnetic field and ionosphere, as a follow up to ESA’s Swarm mission.
faq.q: What will NanoMagSat do?

eoportal.summary_zh: NanoMagSat卫星预计运行寿命为三年，将在此期间持续监测地球磁场和电离层。
eoportal.summary_en: NanoMagSat will monitor Earth’s magnetic field and ionosphere over its expected lifetime of three years.

faq_zh.a: NanoMagSat有时也被称为Swarm Delta，因为它是在ESA Swarm任务的Alpha、Bravo和Charlie卫星之后执行的。
该任务由英国公司Open Cosmos运营，主要资金由ESA提供。科学负责人是巴黎地球物理研究所，此外还有若干较小的机构负责开发有效载荷。
作为ESA Swarm任务的后续，NanoMagSat将监测地球磁场和电离层。

faq_en.a: NanoMagSat is occasionally referred to as Swarm Delta as it follows Swarm Alpha, Bravo, and Charlie.
faq_en.q: Does NanoMagSat go by any other names?

faq_en.a: The British company, Open Cosmos, is operating the mission which is largely funded by ESA. The scientific lead is the Université Paris Cité’s Institut de Physique du Globe de Paris (Paris University’s Institute of Physics), and there is a collection of smaller institutions developing the payloads.
faq_en.q: Who is developing NanoMagSat?

faq_en.a: NanoMagSat will monitor Earth’s magnetic field and ionosphere, as a follow up to ESA’s Swarm mission.
faq_en.q: What will NanoMagSat do?

eoportal.name: NanoSatC-Br1(Brazilian CubeSat Project-1)
eoportal.summary: It has been semi-operational since 2016, due to batteries no longer holding the minimum voltage required, and only transmits beacons in sunlight.

faq.a: This mission primarily measures the intensity of Earth’s Magnetic Field at the South Atlantic Anomaly (SAA) region and on the Brazilian sector of Ionosphere Equatorial Electrojet (EEJ)
faq.q: What does NanosatC-Br1 measure?

faq.a: EEJ and SAA cause variations in the magnetic field strength and can nausea upsets for satellite navigation. They are important phenomena to consider for air-traffic control as well.
faq.q: What are the advantages of studying EEJ and SAA?

faq.a: The sensors onboard the satellite are based on the Hall effect, providing precise measurements with a resolution of up to 15 nT.
faq.q: How does NanoSatC-Br1 measure the magnetic field?

eoportal.summary_zh: 自2016年以来，由于电池无法再维持所需的最低电压，该卫星一直处于半运行状态，仅在日照条件下发射信标。
eoportal.summary_en: It has been semi-operational since 2016, due to batteries no longer holding the minimum voltage required, and only transmits beacons in sunlight.

faq_zh.a: 该任务主要测量南大西洋异常区（SAA）以及巴西电离层赤道电集流（EEJ）区域的地球磁场强度。
赤道电集流和南大西洋异常区会导致磁场强度变化，可能引起卫星导航偏差。它们也是空中交通管制需要考虑的重要现象。
faq_zh.q: 研究赤道电集流和南大西洋异常区有何优势？

faq_zh.a: 卫星上搭载的传感器基于霍尔效应，可提供精确测量，分辨率高达15纳特斯拉。

faq_en.a: This mission primarily measures the intensity of Earth’s Magnetic Field at the South Atlantic Anomaly (SAA) region and on the Brazilian sector of Ionosphere Equatorial Electrojet (EEJ)
faq_en.q: What does NanosatC-Br1 measure?

faq_en.a: EEJ and SAA cause variations in the magnetic field strength and can nausea upsets for satellite navigation. They are important phenomena to consider for air-traffic control as well.
faq_en.q: What are the advantages of studying EEJ and SAA?

faq_en.a: The sensors onboard the satellite are based on the Hall effect, providing precise measurements with a resolution of up to 15 nT.
faq_en.q: How does NanoSatC-Br1 measure the magnetic field?

eoportal.name: NarSha Constellation / Korea Methane Monitoring Microsatellite (K3M)
eoportal.summary: Its primary objective is to create a full-scale global constellation for monitoring methane emissions and identifying their sources.

faq.a: The NarSha constellation is designed to monitor methane emissions globally, mainly identifying sources of methane in cities and providing near-real-time, high-resolution data for climate change analysis.
faq.q: What is the primary purpose of the NarSha constellation?

faq.a: NarSha satellites are equipped with a hyperspectral imager that operates in the short-wave infrared (SWIR) range. Methane absorbs light at specific wavelengths in this range, allowing the imager to detect and quantify methane plumes as small as 100 kg/h with high precision.
faq.q: How does NarSha detect methane emissions?

faq.a: Nara Space utilises its in-house developed Nara Space Technology On-Board Computer (NST OBC) for its satellites. This is an Atmel ARM-based computer specifically designed for CubeSats, capable of handling high data volumes and transfer rates.
faq.q: What technology does Nara Space use for its satellite’s on-board computing and data handling?

eoportal.name_zh: NarSha星座 / 韩国甲烷监测微卫星（K3M）
eoportal.summary_zh: 其主要目标是建立一个用于监测甲烷排放并识别其来源的全球规模星座。
eoportal.summary_en: Its primary objective is to create a full-scale global constellation for monitoring methane emissions and identifying their sources.

faq_zh.a: NarSha星座旨在全球范围内监测甲烷排放，主要识别城市中的甲烷来源，并为气候变化分析提供近实时、高分辨率数据。
faq_zh.q: NarSha星座的主要目的是什么？

faq_zh.a: NarSha卫星配备了一台在短波红外（SWIR）波段工作的高光谱成像仪。甲烷在此波段的特定波长处吸收光线，使成像仪能够高精度地探测和量化小至100公斤/小时的甲烷羽流。
Nara Space为其卫星使用其内部开发的Nara Space Technology星载计算机（NST OBC）。这是一款基于Atmel ARM架构的计算机，专为立方体卫星设计，能够处理高数据量和传输速率。
faq_zh.q: Nara Space在卫星星载计算和数据处理方面使用了什么技术？

faq_en.a: The NarSha constellation is designed to monitor methane emissions globally, mainly identifying sources of methane in cities and providing near-real-time, high-resolution data for climate change analysis.
faq_en.q: What is the primary purpose of the NarSha constellation?

faq_en.a: NarSha satellites are equipped with a hyperspectral imager that operates in the short-wave infrared (SWIR) range. Methane absorbs light at specific wavelengths in this range, allowing the imager to detect and quantify methane plumes as small as 100 kg/h with high precision.
faq_en.q: How does NarSha detect methane emissions?

faq_en.a: Nara Space utilises its in-house developed Nara Space Technology On-Board Computer (NST OBC) for its satellites. This is an Atmel ARM-based computer specifically designed for CubeSats, capable of handling high data volumes and transfer rates.
faq_en.q: What technology does Nara Space use for its satellite’s on-board computing and data handling?

narsha constellation / korea methane mon.display: NarSha Constellation / Korea Methane Monitoring Microsatellite (K3M)

eoportal.name: NEA Scout (Near Earth Asteroid Scout)
eoportal.summary: The secondary payloads, 13 CubeSats, were selected through a series of announcements of flight opportunities, a NASA challenge and negotiations with NASA’s international partners.
eoportal.name_zh: NEA Scout（近地小行星侦察者）
eoportal.summary_zh: 该卫星是作为次级载荷的13颗立方体卫星之一，通过NASA发布的一系列飞行机会公告、一项NASA挑战以及与NASA国际合作伙伴的谈判而被选中。
eoportal.summary_en: The secondary payloads, 13 CubeSats, were selected through a series of announcements of flight opportunities, a NASA challenge and negotiations with NASA’s international partners.

eoportal.name: NeuSAR
eoportal.summary: NeuSAR is the world’s first fully polarimetric small satellite SAR.

faq.a: The NeuSAR mission is a pathfinder mission for a potential constellation of small SAR satellites.
faq.q: What is the aim of the NeuSAR mission?

faq.a: NeuSAR was designed and developed by DSO National Laboratories, Singapore, with support from the Office for Space Technology and Industry (OSTIn).
faq.q: Who owns NeuSAR?

faq.a: NeuSAR was successfully launched on June 30, 2022 aboard an ISRO Indian Polar Satellite Launch Vehicle at 0832 EDT.
faq.q: When was NeuSAR launched?

eoportal.summary_zh: NeuSAR 是全球首颗全极化小卫星合成孔径雷达（SAR）。
eoportal.summary_en: NeuSAR is the world’s first fully polarimetric small satellite SAR.

faq_zh.a: NeuSAR 任务是一个针对未来可能部署的小型 SAR 卫星星座的探路者任务。
faq_zh.q: NeuSAR 任务的目标是什么？

faq_zh.a: NeuSAR 由新加坡国防科技研究院（DSO National Laboratories）在新加坡航天科技与产业办公室（OSTIn）的支持下设计和开发。
NeuSAR 于 2022 年 6 月 30 日，搭载印度空间研究组织（ISRO）的极地卫星运载火箭成功发射，发射时间为东部夏令时 08:32。

faq_en.a: The NeuSAR mission is a pathfinder mission for a potential constellation of small SAR satellites.
faq_en.q: What is the aim of the NeuSAR mission?

faq_en.a: NeuSAR was designed and developed by DSO National Laboratories, Singapore, with support from the Office for Space Technology and Industry (OSTIn).
faq_en.q: Who owns NeuSAR?

faq_en.a: NeuSAR was successfully launched on June 30, 2022 aboard an ISRO Indian Polar Satellite Launch Vehicle at 0832 EDT.
faq_en.q: When was NeuSAR launched?

eoportal.name: NewAthena (Advanced Telescope for High Energy Astrophysics)
eoportal.summary: In particular, NewAthena will investigate the origins and formation of hot gas large-scale structures, as well as the influence of supermassive black holes in active galactic nuclei on the cosmological evolution of galaxies.

faq.a: NewAthena will be an open X-ray observatory, aiming at a wide range of astrophysical investigations of celestial systems such as a complete a census of black hole growth, processes that occur outside the event horizons of black holes to power active galactic nuclei and the formation of hot gas large-scale structures.
faq.q: What is the aim of NewAthena?

faq.a: NewAthena carries the Wide Field Imager (WFI), an array of silicone active pixel sensors with an integrated detector/amplifier structure, and the X-ray Integral Field Unit (X-IFU), an X-ray spectrometer consisting of a microcalorimeter array.
faq.q: What instruments does NewAthena carry?

faq.a: NewAthena will be situated at the First Lagrange point, L1, a gravitationally semi-stable point approximately 1,500,000 km from Earth.
faq.q: Where will NewAthena operate from?

eoportal.name_zh: NewAthena（高级高能天体物理望远镜）
eoportal.summary_zh: 具体而言，NewAthena将研究热气体大尺度结构的起源与形成，以及活动星系核中超大质量黑洞对星系宇宙学演化的影响。
eoportal.summary_en: In particular, NewAthena will investigate the origins and formation of hot gas large-scale structures, as well as the influence of supermassive black holes in active galactic nuclei on the cosmological evolution of galaxies.

faq_zh.a: NewAthena 将作为一个开放式X射线天文台，旨在对天体系统进行广泛的天体物理学研究，例如对黑洞增长进行全面普查，研究黑洞事件视界外驱动活动星系核的过程，以及热气体大尺度结构的形成。
NewAthena 携带了视场仪（WFI），这是一种由硅有源像素传感器阵列组成的仪器，具有集成的探测器/放大器结构；以及X射线积分视场单元（X-IFU），这是一种由微热量计阵列组成的X射线光谱仪。
NewAthena 将位于第一拉格朗日点L1，这是一个距离地球约150万公里、引力上半稳定的点。

faq_en.a: NewAthena will be an open X-ray observatory, aiming at a wide range of astrophysical investigations of celestial systems such as a complete a census of black hole growth, processes that occur outside the event horizons of black holes to power active galactic nuclei and the formation of hot gas large-scale structures.
faq_en.q: What is the aim of NewAthena?

faq_en.a: NewAthena carries the Wide Field Imager (WFI), an array of silicone active pixel sensors with an integrated detector/amplifier structure, and the X-ray Integral Field Unit (X-IFU), an X-ray spectrometer consisting of a microcalorimeter array.
faq_en.q: What instruments does NewAthena carry?

faq_en.a: NewAthena will be situated at the First Lagrange point, L1, a gravitationally semi-stable point approximately 1,500,000 km from Earth.
faq_en.q: Where will NewAthena operate from?

newathena (advanced telescope for high e.display: NewAthena (Advanced Telescope for High Energy Astrophysics)

eoportal.name: NewSat (Aleph-1 Constellation)
eoportal.summary: The first launch was in May 2016.

faq.a: Satellogic has the overall goal to grow its Aleph-1 Constellation to 300 satellites, which would allow global coverage with a revisit time of 5 minutes.
faq.q: How many NewSat microsatellites does Satellogic aim to have in the Aleph-1 Constellation?

faq.a: SpaceX is Satellogic’s preferred vendor for rideshare missions, with a 2022 agreement reserving a launch capacity for the company’s next 68 satellites.
faq.q: Who launches NewSat satellites?

faq.a: Since 2018, Satellogic has respected its tradition of naming the satellites after remarkable women in STEM, commemorating the brilliant pioneers who made significant contributions and discoveries that impacted and inspired millions of lives around the world.
faq.q: Why are the NewSat microsatellites nicknamed after women?

eoportal.summary_zh: 首次发射于2016年5月进行。
eoportal.summary_en: The first launch was in May 2016.

faq_zh.a: Satellogic的总体目标是将Aleph-1星座扩展到300颗卫星，这将使全球覆盖的重访时间缩短至5分钟。
faq_zh.q: Satellogic计划在其Aleph-1星座中部署多少颗NewSat微卫星？

faq_zh.a: SpaceX是Satellogic共享发射任务的首选供应商，根据2022年的一项协议，该公司为Satellogic后续的68颗卫星预留了发射能力。
自2018年以来，Satellogic一直遵循以其杰出STEM领域女性为卫星命名的传统，以纪念那些做出重大贡献和发现、并影响和激励了全球数百万人的杰出先驱。
faq_zh.q: 为什么NewSat微卫星以女性命名？

faq_en.a: Satellogic has the overall goal to grow its Aleph-1 Constellation to 300 satellites, which would allow global coverage with a revisit time of 5 minutes.
faq_en.q: How many NewSat microsatellites does Satellogic aim to have in the Aleph-1 Constellation?

faq_en.a: SpaceX is Satellogic’s preferred vendor for rideshare missions, with a 2022 agreement reserving a launch capacity for the company’s next 68 satellites.
faq_en.q: Who launches NewSat satellites?

faq_en.a: Since 2018, Satellogic has respected its tradition of naming the satellites after remarkable women in STEM, commemorating the brilliant pioneers who made significant contributions and discoveries that impacted and inspired millions of lives around the world.
faq_en.q: Why are the NewSat microsatellites nicknamed after women?

eoportal.name: NISAR (NASA-ISRO Synthetic Aperture Radar)
taxonomy: Sea ice cover, edge and thickness
eoportal.summary: This radar imaging satellite aims to monitors changes in the Earth’s surface associated with the movement of the crust and ice cover.

faq.a: NISAR was first proposed by NASA as a response to the National Research Council (NRC) Decadal Survey of 2007 which acknowledged a lack of data and insight into three earth science areas: Deformation, Ecosystem Structure, and Dynamics of Ice (DESDynI).
faq.q: Why was NISAR made?

faq.a: The pointing accuracy of NISAR is so accurate that it can detect changes in land, snow, and ice cover as little as 4 mm per year.
faq.q: How accurate is NISAR?

faq.a: NISAR has a design life of three years.
faq.q: What is NISAR’s design life?

eoportal.summary_zh: 这颗雷达成像卫星旨在监测与地壳运动和冰盖变化相关的地表变化。
eoportal.summary_en: This radar imaging satellite aims to monitors changes in the Earth’s surface associated with the movement of the crust and ice cover.

faq_zh.a: NISAR最初由NASA提出，作为对2007年美国国家研究委员会（NRC）十年调查的回应。该调查指出了在三个地球科学领域——地表形变、生态系统结构和冰动力学（DESDynI）——缺乏数据和深入理解的状况。
NISAR的指向精度非常高，能够探测到陆地、积雪和冰盖每年仅4毫米的变化。
NISAR的设计寿命为三年。
faq_zh.q: NISAR卫星的设计寿命是多久？

faq_en.a: NISAR was first proposed by NASA as a response to the National Research Council (NRC) Decadal Survey of 2007 which acknowledged a lack of data and insight into three earth science areas: Deformation, Ecosystem Structure, and Dynamics of Ice (DESDynI).
faq_en.q: Why was NISAR made?

faq_en.a: The pointing accuracy of NISAR is so accurate that it can detect changes in land, snow, and ice cover as little as 4 mm per year.
faq_en.q: How accurate is NISAR?

faq_en.a: NISAR has a design life of three years.
faq_en.q: What is NISAR’s design life?

eoportal.name: NorSat-1 and 2
eoportal.summary: NorSat-2 is the second installation of the microsatellite series, also launched in July 2017, and aims to provide additional, advanced ship tracking and Very High Frequency (VHF) Data Exchange (VDE) services.

faq.a: NorSat-1 and -2 are owned by the Norwegian Space Centre (NSC), with contributions from the University of Toronto Institute for Aerospace Studies (UTIAS) Space Flight Laboratory (SFL), PMOD (Physikalisch-Meteorologisches Observatorium Davos) World Radiation Centre, and the University of Oslo.
faq.q: Who developed NorSat-1 and -2?

faq.a: Between NorSat-1 and -2, NSC aims to  investigate solar radiation and space weather, as well as develop new methods for the detection and management of ship traffic, and provision of Very High Frequency (VHF) Data Exchange (VDE) services.
faq.q: What is the aim of NorSat-1 and -2?

faq.a: Both Norsat-1 and -2 are operational, but are expected to leave service in December 2022.
faq.q: Are NorSat-1 and -2 still operational?

eoportal.summary_zh: NorSat-2 是该微小卫星系列的第二颗星，同样于 2017 年 7 月发射，旨在提供额外的先进船舶跟踪和甚高频（VHF）数据交换（VDE）服务。
eoportal.summary_en: NorSat-2 is the second installation of the microsatellite series, also launched in July 2017, and aims to provide additional, advanced ship tracking and Very High Frequency (VHF) Data Exchange (VDE) services.

faq_zh.a: NorSat-1 和 -2 由挪威航天中心（NSC）拥有，并得到多伦多大学航空航天研究所（UTIAS）太空飞行实验室（SFL）、PMOD（达沃斯物理-气象观测站）世界辐射中心以及奥斯陆大学的贡献。
在 NorSat-1 和 -2 之间，NSC 旨在研究太阳辐射和空间天气，以及开发船舶交通检测与管理的新方法，并提供甚高频（VHF）数据交换（VDE）服务。
faq_zh.q: NorSat-1 和 -2 的目标是什么？

faq_zh.a: NorSat-1 和 -2 均处于运行状态，但预计将于 2022 年 12 月退役。
faq_zh.q: NorSat-1 和 -2 仍在运行吗？

faq_en.a: NorSat-1 and -2 are owned by the Norwegian Space Centre (NSC), with contributions from the University of Toronto Institute for Aerospace Studies (UTIAS) Space Flight Laboratory (SFL), PMOD (Physikalisch-Meteorologisches Observatorium Davos) World Radiation Centre, and the University of Oslo.
faq_en.q: Who developed NorSat-1 and -2?

faq_en.a: Between NorSat-1 and -2, NSC aims to  investigate solar radiation and space weather, as well as develop new methods for the detection and management of ship traffic, and provision of Very High Frequency (VHF) Data Exchange (VDE) services.
faq_en.q: What is the aim of NorSat-1 and -2?

faq_en.a: Both Norsat-1 and -2 are operational, but are expected to leave service in December 2022.
faq_en.q: Are NorSat-1 and -2 still operational?

eoportal.name: NORSAT-3 and 4
eoportal.summary: NORSAT-4, launched in January 2025, has been developed to further enhance Norway’s sea observation capabilities.

faq.a: The NORSAT-3 microsatellite was launched as a passenger payload on 29 April 2021 on a Vega launch vehicle operated by Arianespace, which lifted off successfully from the Guiana Space Center, Europe’s Spaceport in French Guiana.
faq.q: How was NORSAT-3 launched?

faq.a: NORSAT-3 aids the Norwegian Coastal Administration in understanding the maritime situation on Norway’s seas by receiving AIS and radar signals from vessels.
faq.q: What is NORSAT-3 used for?

faq.a: An important new addition on NORSAT-4 will be a low-light imaging camera.
faq.q: How will NORSAT-4 differ from NORSAT-3?

eoportal.summary_zh: NORSAT-4 于 2025 年 1 月发射，旨在进一步提升挪威的海洋观测能力。
eoportal.summary_en: NORSAT-4, launched in January 2025, has been developed to further enhance Norway’s sea observation capabilities.

faq_zh.a: NORSAT-3 微卫星于 2021 年 4 月 29 日作为搭载载荷，由 Arianespace 运营的 Vega 运载火箭从法属圭亚那的欧洲航天港——库鲁航天中心成功发射升空。
NORSAT-3 通过接收来自船只的 AIS 和雷达信号，帮助挪威海岸管理局了解挪威海域的海上态势。
NORSAT-4 的一个重要新增功能是配备了一台微光成像相机。
faq_zh.q: NORSAT-4 与 NORSAT-3 有何不同？

faq_en.a: The NORSAT-3 microsatellite was launched as a passenger payload on 29 April 2021 on a Vega launch vehicle operated by Arianespace, which lifted off successfully from the Guiana Space Center, Europe’s Spaceport in French Guiana.
faq_en.q: How was NORSAT-3 launched?

faq_en.a: NORSAT-3 aids the Norwegian Coastal Administration in understanding the maritime situation on Norway’s seas by receiving AIS and radar signals from vessels.
faq_en.q: What is NORSAT-3 used for?

faq_en.a: An important new addition on NORSAT-4 will be a low-light imaging camera.
faq_en.q: How will NORSAT-4 differ from NORSAT-3?

eoportal.name: NorSat-TD (NorSat Technology Demonstrator)
eoportal.summary: NorSat-TD is designed as a microsatellite aimed at validating and testing out new payloads and concepts from Norway, the Netherlands, France and Italy.

faq.a: NorSat-TD is aimed as a technological demonstration mission onboard a microsatellite form factor to validate and test new payloads and concepts from a variety of agencies and companies from Europe.
faq.q: What is the purpose of NorSat-TD?

faq.a: Space Flight Laboratory (SFL) of University of Toronto, Institute for Aerospace Studies (UTIAS) in Canada was awarded the contract to develop NorSat-TD from the Norwegian Space Agency.
faq.q: Who developed NorSat-TD?

faq.a: NorSat-TD will be carrying an Automatic Identification System (AIS) receiver, Small Communication Active Terminal (SmallCAT), VHF (Very high Frequency) Data Exchange System (VDES), Onboard Laser Reflector and Satellite Collision Avoidance.
faq.q: What instruments will NorSat-TD carry?

eoportal.summary_zh: NorSat-TD是一颗微卫星，旨在验证和测试来自挪威、荷兰、法国和意大利的新载荷与技术概念。
eoportal.summary_en: NorSat-TD is designed as a microsatellite aimed at validating and testing out new payloads and concepts from Norway, the Netherlands, France and Italy.

faq_zh.a: NorSat-TD是一项技术验证任务，采用微卫星平台，旨在验证和测试来自欧洲多家机构和公司的新载荷与技术概念。
NorSat-TD的开发合同由挪威航天局授予加拿大多伦多大学航空航天研究所的航天飞行实验室。
NorSat-TD将搭载自动识别系统接收机、小型通信有源终端、甚高频数据交换系统、星载激光反射器和卫星防撞系统。

faq_en.a: NorSat-TD is aimed as a technological demonstration mission onboard a microsatellite form factor to validate and test new payloads and concepts from a variety of agencies and companies from Europe.
faq_en.q: What is the purpose of NorSat-TD?

faq_en.a: Space Flight Laboratory (SFL) of University of Toronto, Institute for Aerospace Studies (UTIAS) in Canada was awarded the contract to develop NorSat-TD from the Norwegian Space Agency.
faq_en.q: Who developed NorSat-TD?

faq_en.a: NorSat-TD will be carrying an Automatic Identification System (AIS) receiver, Small Communication Active Terminal (SmallCAT), VHF (Very high Frequency) Data Exchange System (VDES), Onboard Laser Reflector and Satellite Collision Avoidance.
faq_en.q: What instruments will NorSat-TD carry?

eoportal.name: NovaSAR-1
taxonomy: Sea ice cover, edge and thickness
eoportal.summary: Airbus Defence & Space Ltd, with funding from organisations in the UK, India, Australia and the Philippines.

faq.a: NovaSAR-1 is a technology demonstration satellite mission designed to test the capabilities of a new low cost S-band SAR (Synthetic Aperture Radar) platform.
faq.q: What is NovaSAR-1?

faq.a: NovaSAR-1 uses S-band SAR to image Earth through all weather conditions, including heavy cloud and smoke, and during the night. This offers a valuable data advantage for many applications including forest monitoring, ship detection and disaster management.
faq.q: What is the imaging advantage of NovaSAR-1?

faq.a: NovaSAR-1 is currently the only operational NovaSAR satellite, however, there are plans to develop other SAR imaging satellites. The target constellation is three satellites to provide more frequent revisit times.
faq.q: How many NovaSAR satellites are there?

eoportal.summary_zh: NovaSAR-1卫星由空客防务与航天有限公司（Airbus Defence & Space Ltd）负责，并获得来自英国、印度、澳大利亚和菲律宾相关组织的资金支持。
eoportal.summary_en: Airbus Defence & Space Ltd, with funding from organisations in the UK, India, Australia and the Philippines.

faq_zh.a: NovaSAR-1是一项技术验证卫星任务，旨在测试一种新型低成本S波段合成孔径雷达（SAR）平台的能力。
NovaSAR-1利用S波段SAR在全天候条件下（包括浓云和烟雾）以及夜间对地球进行成像。这为包括森林监测、船舶检测和灾害管理在内的多种应用提供了宝贵的数据优势。
目前只有一颗在轨运行的NovaSAR卫星，即NovaSAR-1。但计划开发其他SAR成像卫星。目标是构建一个由三颗卫星组成的星座，以提供更频繁的重访周期。

faq_en.a: NovaSAR-1 is a technology demonstration satellite mission designed to test the capabilities of a new low cost S-band SAR (Synthetic Aperture Radar) platform.
faq_en.q: What is NovaSAR-1?

faq_en.a: NovaSAR-1 uses S-band SAR to image Earth through all weather conditions, including heavy cloud and smoke, and during the night. This offers a valuable data advantage for many applications including forest monitoring, ship detection and disaster management.
faq_en.q: What is the imaging advantage of NovaSAR-1?

faq_en.a: NovaSAR-1 is currently the only operational NovaSAR satellite, however, there are plans to develop other SAR imaging satellites. The target constellation is three satellites to provide more frequent revisit times.
faq_en.q: How many NovaSAR satellites are there?

eoportal.name: NUVIEW Constellation
eoportal.summary: With support from the US Department of Defence, NUVIEW aims to increase the quantity of topographical data available for infrastructure planning and environmental management.

faq.a: The initial launch contains five satellites, with continuous installments of five until a total of 20 satellites are operational.
faq.q: How many satellites are to be launched in NUVIEW’s constellation?

faq.a: NUVIEW sets out to map the Earth for detailed infrastructure/environment planning. Lidar improves upon both optical and SAR imaging through an increase in accuracy (35 times that of optical imagery and 120 times that of SAR) and is thus the best sensor type for this task. Additionally, lidar is an active sensing technique, projecting photons and then receiving the reflected photons to map continuously as it is not daylight dependent.
faq.q: Why is NUVIEW developing a lidar satellite constellation?

faq.a: The US Department of Defence has funded NUVIEW through the National Security Innovation Capital (NSIC). Across two approvals, $7.75 million has been provided by the NSIC in the name of high quality 3D mapping and production of geospatial data.
faq.q: Which US government department provided funding to NUVIEW?

eoportal.summary_zh: 在美国国防部的支持下，NUVIEW旨在增加可用于基础设施规划和环境管理的地形数据量。
eoportal.summary_en: With support from the US Department of Defence, NUVIEW aims to increase the quantity of topographical data available for infrastructure planning and environmental management.

faq_zh.a: 首次发射包括五颗卫星，之后将分批次陆续发射，直至总计20颗卫星全部在轨运行。
faq_zh.q: NUVIEW星座将发射多少颗卫星？

faq_zh.a: NUVIEW旨在为详细的基础设施/环境规划绘制地球地图。激光雷达通过提高精度（比光学影像高35倍，比SAR高120倍）改进了光学和SAR成像，因此是执行此任务的最佳传感器类型。此外，激光雷达是一种主动传感技术，它发射光子并接收反射回来的光子进行连续测绘，因为它不依赖于日光。
faq_zh.q: 为什么NUVIEW要开发激光雷达卫星星座？

faq_zh.a: 美国国防部已通过国家安全创新资本（NSIC）为NUVIEW提供资金。在两次批准中，NSIC以高质量三维测绘和地理空间数据生产为名，提供了775万美元的资金。
faq_zh.q: 哪个美国政府部门为NUVIEW提供了资金？

faq_en.a: The initial launch contains five satellites, with continuous installments of five until a total of 20 satellites are operational.
faq_en.q: How many satellites are to be launched in NUVIEW’s constellation?

faq_en.a: NUVIEW sets out to map the Earth for detailed infrastructure/environment planning. Lidar improves upon both optical and SAR imaging through an increase in accuracy (35 times that of optical imagery and 120 times that of SAR) and is thus the best sensor type for this task. Additionally, lidar is an active sensing technique, projecting photons and then receiving the reflected photons to map continuously as it is not daylight dependent.
faq_en.q: Why is NUVIEW developing a lidar satellite constellation?

faq_en.a: The US Department of Defence has funded NUVIEW through the National Security Innovation Capital (NSIC). Across two approvals, $7.75 million has been provided by the NSIC in the name of high quality 3D mapping and production of geospatial data.
faq_en.q: Which US government department provided funding to NUVIEW?

eoportal.name: Oceansat-3
eoportal.summary: It aims to provide service continuity for users of Oceansat-2 data, as well as improve upon existing remote sensing capabilities in the field of oceanography.

faq.a: Oceansat-3 is owned and operated by the India Space research Organisation (ISRO), although it does carry the ARGOS-4 data collection system, which has been supplied by the National Centre for Space Studies (CNES) of France.
faq.q: Who owns Oceansat-3?

faq.a: Oceansat-3 aims to provide service continuity for users of Oceansat-2 data, as well as improve upon existing remote sensing capabilities in the field of oceanography.
faq.q: What is the aim of Oceansat-3?

faq.a: Oceansat-3 carries four instruments, the Oceansat Scatterometer (OSCAT-3), The Ocean Colour Monitor (OCM-3), a Sea Surface Temperature Monitor (SSTM) and the ARGOS-4 data collection system, also known as the Advanced Data Collection System (ADCS-4).
faq.q: What instruments does Oceansat-3 carry?

eoportal.summary_zh: 该卫星旨在为Oceansat-2数据用户提供服务延续性，并提升现有海洋学领域的遥感观测能力。
eoportal.summary_en: It aims to provide service continuity for users of Oceansat-2 data, as well as improve upon existing remote sensing capabilities in the field of oceanography.

faq_zh.a: Oceansat-3由印度空间研究组织（ISRO）拥有和运营，但它搭载了由法国国家空间研究中心（CNES）提供的ARGOS-4数据采集系统。
Oceansat-3旨在为Oceansat-2数据用户提供服务延续性，并提升现有海洋学领域的遥感观测能力。
Oceansat-3搭载了四台仪器：海洋散射计（OSCAT-3）、海洋水色监测仪（OCM-3）、海表温度监测仪（SSTM）以及ARGOS-4数据采集系统（也称为高级数据采集系统ADCS-4）。

faq_en.a: Oceansat-3 is owned and operated by the India Space research Organisation (ISRO), although it does carry the ARGOS-4 data collection system, which has been supplied by the National Centre for Space Studies (CNES) of France.
faq_en.q: Who owns Oceansat-3?

faq_en.a: Oceansat-3 aims to provide service continuity for users of Oceansat-2 data, as well as improve upon existing remote sensing capabilities in the field of oceanography.
faq_en.q: What is the aim of Oceansat-3?

faq_en.a: Oceansat-3 carries four instruments, the Oceansat Scatterometer (OSCAT-3), The Ocean Colour Monitor (OCM-3), a Sea Surface Temperature Monitor (SSTM) and the ARGOS-4 data collection system, also known as the Advanced Data Collection System (ADCS-4).
faq_en.q: What instruments does Oceansat-3 carry?

eoportal.name: OCO-2 (Orbiting Carbon Observatory-2)
eoportal.summary: OCO-2 is dedicated to the study of atmospheric carbon dioxide and oxygen, including global geographical distribution of carbon dioxide and oxygen sources and sinks.

faq.a: OCO-2 is owned and operated by NASA (National Aeronautics and Space Administration) of the USA.
faq.q: Who owns OCO-2?

faq.a: OCO-2 was launched in July 2014, after the loss of its predecessor, OCO-1, in a launch vehicle failure on February 24, 2009.
faq.q: When was OCO-2 launched?

faq.a: OCO-2 aims to observe atmospheric carbon dioxide and oxygen, and their geographic distribution.
faq.q: What is the purpose of OCO-2?

eoportal.summary_zh: OCO-2卫星专注于研究大气中的二氧化碳和氧气，包括全球范围内二氧化碳和氧气源与汇的地理分布。
eoportal.summary_en: OCO-2 is dedicated to the study of atmospheric carbon dioxide and oxygen, including global geographical distribution of carbon dioxide and oxygen sources and sinks.

faq_zh.a: OCO-2由美国国家航空航天局（NASA）拥有并运营。
OCO-2于2014年7月发射，其前身OCO-1在2009年2月24日的运载火箭故障中损失。
OCO-2旨在观测大气中的二氧化碳和氧气及其地理分布。

faq_en.a: OCO-2 is owned and operated by NASA (National Aeronautics and Space Administration) of the USA.
faq_en.q: Who owns OCO-2?

faq_en.a: OCO-2 was launched in July 2014, after the loss of its predecessor, OCO-1, in a launch vehicle failure on February 24, 2009.

faq_en.a: OCO-2 aims to observe atmospheric carbon dioxide and oxygen, and their geographic distribution.

eoportal.name: Odin Satellite
eoportal.summary: The satellite has studied atmospheric processes for over 20 years, far exceeding its design life of two years.

faq.a: Odin is an aeronomy and astronomy minisatellite with applications for atmospheric research, stratospheric ozone chemistry, mesospheric ozone science and summer mesospheric science.
faq.q: What does the Odin satellite do?

faq.a: Launched in February 2001, Odin remains operational after 21 years. The satellite is the second-oldest European Space Agency (ESA) Third Party Mission (TPM) still operational.
faq.q: How long has Odin remained operational for?

faq.a: Odin is operated by OHB Sweden, on behalf of the Swedish National Space Agency (SNSA) and the Swedish Space Corporation (SSC). The satellite is also part of ESA’s Third Part Mission (TPM) fleet.
faq.q: Who operates Odin?

eoportal.agency_zh: ESA（欧空局）、CNES（法国国家空间研究中心）、CSA（加拿大航天局）、TEKES、SNSA（瑞典国家航天局）
eoportal.summary_zh: 该卫星研究大气过程已超过20年，远超其两年的设计寿命。
eoportal.summary_en: The satellite has studied atmospheric processes for over 20 years, far exceeding its design life of two years.

faq_zh.a: Odin是一颗气辉和天文学微小卫星，应用于大气研究、平流层臭氧化学、中间层臭氧科学以及夏季中间层科学。
Odin于2001年2月发射，在运行21年后仍然在轨工作。该卫星是欧洲航天局（ESA）仍在运行的第二古老的第三方任务（TPM）。
Odin由OHB Sweden代表瑞典国家航天局（SNSA）和瑞典航天公司（SSC）运营。该卫星也是ESA第三方任务（TPM）计划的一部分。

faq_en.q: What does the Odin satellite do?

faq_en.a: Launched in February 2001, Odin remains operational after 21 years. The satellite is the second-oldest European Space Agency (ESA) Third Party Mission (TPM) still operational.
faq_en.q: How long has Odin remained operational for?

faq_en.a: Odin is operated by OHB Sweden, on behalf of the Swedish National Space Agency (SNSA) and the Swedish Space Corporation (SSC). The satellite is also part of ESA’s Third Part Mission (TPM) fleet.

eoportal.name: OneWeb Minisatellite Constellation
eoportal.summary: The full system consists of 648 satellites, manufactured by Airbus Defence and Space, with launches beginning in 2019.

faq.a: No, OneWeb and Starlink are separate satellite internet providers. Both operate communications constellations in low Earth orbit, but they differ in size and altitude. Starlink operates at around 550 km with a much larger fleet of approximately 4500 satellites, while OneWeb orbits at about 1200 km with a constellation of 648 satellites.
faq.q: Is OneWeb the same as Starlink?

faq.a: As of 2024, OneWeb has completed deployment of its initial constellation of around 648 satellites in low Earth orbit. This enables it to provide internet coverage across most of the globe.
faq.q: Is OneWeb fully operational?

faq.a: OneWeb is headquartered in London, United Kingdom.
faq.q: Where is OneWeb headquarters?

eoportal.summary_zh: 完整的系统由648颗卫星组成，由空中客车防务与航天公司制造，首次发射始于2019年。
eoportal.summary_en: The full system consists of 648 satellites, manufactured by Airbus Defence and Space, with launches beginning in 2019.

faq_zh.a: 不是，OneWeb 和 Starlink 是独立的卫星互联网服务商。两者都运营近地轨道通信星座，但规模和轨道高度不同。Starlink 运行在约550公里高度，拥有约4500颗卫星的更大规模星座；而 OneWeb 运行在约1200公里高度，星座由648颗卫星组成。
faq_zh.q: OneWeb 和 Starlink 是一回事吗？

faq_zh.a: 截至2024年，OneWeb 已完成其在近地轨道上部署约648颗卫星的初始星座。这使其能够为全球大部分地区提供互联网覆盖。
faq_zh.q: OneWeb 是否已全面投入运营？

faq_zh.a: OneWeb 的总部位于英国伦敦。

faq_en.a: No, OneWeb and Starlink are separate satellite internet providers. Both operate communications constellations in low Earth orbit, but they differ in size and altitude. Starlink operates at around 550 km with a much larger fleet of approximately 4500 satellites, while OneWeb orbits at about 1200 km with a constellation of 648 satellites.
faq_en.q: Is OneWeb the same as Starlink?

faq_en.a: As of 2024, OneWeb has completed deployment of its initial constellation of around 648 satellites in low Earth orbit. This enables it to provide internet coverage across most of the globe.
faq_en.q: Is OneWeb fully operational?

eoportal.name: OPS-SAT (Operations nanoSatellite)
eoportal.summary: It is the world’s first satellite mission dedicated to testing satellite control technology in orbit.

faq.a: OPS-SAT was a standardised CubeSat with a size of three units and a total dimensions of (0.3 m x 0.1 m x 0.1 m).
faq.q: How big was OPS-SAT?

faq.a: OPS-SAT was an experimental satellite that allowed space companies throughout Europe to test various mission control systems that would have been more expensive through other means.
faq.q: What was OPS-SAT used for?

faq.a: OPS-SAT was able to adjust its attitude using three different pieces of equipment: gyroscopes, reaction wheels, and magnetorquers.
faq.q: How many different attitude adjustment methods did OPS-SAT have?

eoportal.summary_zh: 这是全球首个专注于在轨测试卫星控制技术的卫星任务。
eoportal.summary_en: It is the world’s first satellite mission dedicated to testing satellite control technology in orbit.

faq_zh.a: OPS-SAT 是一颗标准化的 CubeSat（立方体卫星），尺寸为 3U，总尺寸为（0.3米 x 0.1米 x 0.1米）。
OPS-SAT 是一颗实验卫星，使欧洲各地的太空公司能够测试各种任务控制系统，相比其他方式测试成本更低。
OPS-SAT 能够使用三种不同的设备调整其姿态：陀螺仪、反作用轮和磁力矩器。
faq_zh.q: OPS-SAT 有多少种不同的姿态调整方法？

faq_en.a: OPS-SAT was a standardised CubeSat with a size of three units and a total dimensions of (0.3 m x 0.1 m x 0.1 m).
faq_en.q: How big was OPS-SAT?

faq_en.a: OPS-SAT was an experimental satellite that allowed space companies throughout Europe to test various mission control systems that would have been more expensive through other means.
faq_en.q: What was OPS-SAT used for?

faq_en.a: OPS-SAT was able to adjust its attitude using three different pieces of equipment: gyroscopes, reaction wheels, and magnetorquers.
faq_en.q: How many different attitude adjustment methods did OPS-SAT have?

eoportal.summary: The constellation consists of four satellites operating in pairs, all launched in July 2025, with the potential to expand to twenty satellites.

faq.a: The CO3D aims to produce a worldwide 1 metre accurate Digital Elevation Model (DEM).
faq.q: What is the aim of the CO3D constellation?

faq.a: The French Space Agency, CNES, has contracted the construction and operation of the CO3D constellation to Airbus Defence and Space.
faq.q: Who is operating the CO3D constellation?

faq.a: Each CO3D satellite is equipped with a EOS-X high resolution optical imager.

eoportal.summary_zh: 该星座由四颗卫星组成，以双星配对模式运行，均于2025年7月发射，未来有潜力扩展至二十颗卫星。
eoportal.summary_en: The constellation consists of four satellites operating in pairs, all launched in July 2025, with the potential to expand to twenty satellites.

faq_zh.a: CO3D旨在生成全球范围1米精度的数字高程模型（DEM）。
法国国家空间研究中心（CNES）已将CO3D星座的建设和运营合同授予空中客车防务与航天公司。
每颗CO3D卫星都配备了一台EOS-X高分辨率光学成像仪。

faq_en.a: The CO3D aims to produce a worldwide 1 metre accurate Digital Elevation Model (DEM).

faq_en.a: The French Space Agency, CNES, has contracted the construction and operation of the CO3D constellation to Airbus Defence and Space.

eoportal.name: OptiSAR (Optical and SAR) Commercial Constellation of UrtheCast
eoportal.summary: The Canadian Earth observation company became bankrupt in 2021 hence the commercial mission never launched.

faq.a: OptiSAR was a planned constellation of eight optical imaging satellites and eight SAR satellites. The mission was cancelled as the operational company, UrtheCast, became bankrupt.
faq.q: What was OptiSAR?

faq.a: The AIS allows the imaging instruments to pinpoint areas of maritime interest.
faq.q: What purpose does the AIS have, onboard OptiSAR?

faq.a: EarthDaily Analytics (EDA) was a company that was erected in 2021 after buying several parts of UrtheCast prior to it becoming bankrupt. Expected to launch in 2023, EDA is launching the EarthDaily constellation which has similar capabilities to OptiSAR.
faq.q: Are there any existing plans to continue ahead with OptiSAR?

eoportal.summary_zh: 这家加拿大地球观测公司于2021年破产，因此该商业任务从未发射。
eoportal.summary_en: The Canadian Earth observation company became bankrupt in 2021 hence the commercial mission never launched.

faq_zh.a: OptiSAR原计划是一个由八颗光学成像卫星和八颗SAR卫星组成的星座。由于运营公司UrtheCast破产，该任务被取消。
AIS（船舶自动识别系统）允许成像仪器定位海事关注区域。
EarthDaily Analytics (EDA) 是一家于2021年在UrtheCast破产前收购其部分资产后成立的公司。EDA计划于2023年发射地球每日星座，该星座具有与OptiSAR相似的能力。
faq_zh.q: 是否有任何现有计划继续推进OptiSAR？

faq_en.a: The AIS allows the imaging instruments to pinpoint areas of maritime interest.
faq_en.q: What purpose does the AIS have, onboard OptiSAR?

eoportal.name: OrbView-3 Minisatellite
eoportal.summary: The spacecraft was built with a five-year design life, however, the mission was terminated in April 2007 after an instrument camera malfunctioned, and OrbView-3 reentered Earth’s atmosphere in March 2011.

faq.a: OrbView-3 was developed by the Orbital Imaging Corporation (ORBIMAGE) of Dulles, Virginia USA. In 2006 ORBIMAGE merged with Space Imaging of Thornton, Colorado USA, to establish the commercial Imaging company GeoEye.
faq.q: Who developed OrbView-3?

faq.a: OrbView-3 was launched in June 2003 on an OSC launch vehicle (Pegasus-XL) from Virginia Air Force Base, California USA.
faq.q: When was OrbView-3 launched?

faq.a: No, the OrbView-3 mission was terminated in April 2007 after the instrument camera malfunctioned and the spacecraft was deorbited in March 2011.
faq.q: Is OrbView-3 still in orbit?

eoportal.summary_zh: 该卫星的设计寿命为五年，但因其仪器相机发生故障，任务于2007年4月终止。OrbView-3于2011年3月再入地球大气层。
eoportal.summary_en: The spacecraft was built with a five-year design life, however, the mission was terminated in April 2007 after an instrument camera malfunctioned, and OrbView-3 reentered Earth’s atmosphere in March 2011.

faq_zh.a: OrbView-3由位于美国弗吉尼亚州杜勒斯的轨道成像公司（ORBIMAGE）开发。2006年，ORBIMAGE与位于美国科罗拉多州桑顿的空间成像公司合并，成立了商业成像公司GeoEye。
OrbView-3于2003年6月搭载OSC运载火箭（飞马座-XL）从美国加利福尼亚州的弗吉尼亚空军基地发射升空。
不，OrbView-3任务于2007年4月因仪器相机故障而终止，该航天器于2011年3月离轨。
